concerns.detail: Discloses full name and personal details of a student (non-faculty member) Yufei Ding, including romantic relationship status (girlfriend of Hao Ran Geng) and unsubstantiated allegations of personal/academic misconduct, violating privacy protections for private individuals.
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding 不是只放prof吗怎么学生也开出来了.. 注意这不是丁老师，是同名学生 今年stanford的phd，hao ran geng 的女朋友，纯学术妲 己,考试还作弊

concerns.detail: Contains unsupported sexualized character attacks including claims of sexual repression, vulgar descriptions of mental state ('满脑子黄色废料'), and mockery regarding alleged harassment incidents.
concerns.excerpt: 此人性压抑太严重，约炮失败还恼羞成怒）（不确定是不是约炮，也许只是嘴贱，满脑子黄色废料

concerns.detail: Uses gendered slur '学术妲己' (academic Daji/mythical seductress) to demean a female student's academic achievements based on alleged personal relationships rather than concrete advising practices.
